interactions.summary: Okay. So everything over here. Everything. Mexico. Including Greenland, including Canada, including Mexico. Every part of this area belongs to the United States. Therefore you cannot trade with any of these countries without American permission, without paying a tribute to the Americans. And this is why that the Americans have...
